description: Single filer, age 67 (born 1958), one W-2 with $80,000 wages and $5,000 box7 social security tips (also declared as qualified tips on Schedule 1-A), $10,000 federal withheld, standard deduction, no dependents. Exercises BOTH OBBBA pre-tax-bracket patches (senior deduction + Schedule 1-A tips) in a single compute() call AND the wave-3-cleanup validation pipeline. The return is FFFF-compatible — no blockers triggered.
authority: skill/scripts/calc/patches/obbba_senior_deduction.py: single base $6,000, phase-out starts at $75,000, 6% rate
skill/scripts/calc/patches/obbba_schedule_1a.py: tips cap $25,000, single phase-out starts at $150,000, no phase-out at MAGI $80k
CP4 tenforty verification locked Single TY2025 brackets for federal income tax

hand_check.tax_tables_delta: IRS tax tables use $50 midpoints; $53,550 lands in the bracket centered at $53,575. tenforty rounds to 6701 (+6 vs bracket formula — same mechanism as simple_w2_standard)
